name: strix-halo-guide
desc: Complete guide to running large language models locally on AMD Strix Halo / Ryzen AI MAX+ 395 with Radeon 8060S (gfx1151) and 96GB/128GB unified memory. Covers…
descFull: Complete guide to running large language models locally on AMD Strix Halo / Ryzen AI MAX+ 395 with Radeon 8060S (gfx1151) and 96GB/128GB unified memory. Covers BIOS config, Ubuntu/kernel setup, Ollama, llama.cpp Vulkan/RADV, ROCm/HIP, vLLM, and 70B/120B GGUF evidence.
